heroHeadline: AMLO's Fourth Transformation: Record Poverty Reduction, Record Violence, and Judicial Revolution
heroSubtitle: Six years of 4T governance: 13.4 million lifted from poverty, 166,000+ homicides, $28B Tren Maya, and Mexico's judiciary upended by popular vote
footerNote: Data sourced from INEGI, CONEVAL, SESNSP, Banco de México, Diario Oficial, Animal Político, Reforma, Reuters, and CSIS
